ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., major, regular) */,
  "par_score" INTEGER /* Standard score for the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "course_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Typical weather conditions during the tournament */,
  "historical_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the previous year's winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Number of career wins */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Player's handicap */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "preferred_hand" TEXT /* Player's preferred hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Player's current world ranking */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the player's social media profiles */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Player's sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the score belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the tournament (1-4) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the round */,
  "hole_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each hole in the round (e.g., '3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5') */,
  "putts" INTEGER /* Number of putts in the round */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Number of fairways hit */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Number of greens hit in regulation */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred */,
  "time_taken" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the round (e.g., '3:45') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the leaderboard belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the player in the tournament */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "to_par" INTEGER /* Score relative to par */,
  "putts" INTEGER /* Total putts in the tournament */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Total fairways hit in the tournament */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Total greens hit in regulation in the tournament */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties incurred in the tournament */,
  "time_taken" TEXT /* Total time taken to complete the tournament (e.g., '15:00') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., score to par) */,
  "statistic_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "hole_statistics" TEXT /* Detailed statistics for each hole (e.g., '3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5,3,4,5') */,
  "putts_per_round" TEXT /* Average putts per round */,
  "fairways_hit_per_round" TEXT /* Average fairways hit per round */,
  "greens_in_regulation_per_round" TEXT /* Average greens in regulation per round */,
  "penalties_per_round" TEXT /* Average penalties per round */,
  "time_per_round" TEXT /* Average time taken per round (e.g., '3:45') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tournament administrator, player, spectator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences (e.g., email notifications, SMS notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the administrator is managing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., tournament director, scorekeeper) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Administrator's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Administrator's email */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in tournament management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_administrators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_administrators_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournaments" (
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament pair */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "entry_fee" INTEGER /* Entry fee paid by the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered for the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status in the tournament (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the round belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round (1-4) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the round */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the round */,
  "course_conditions" TEXT /* Condition of the course during the round */,
  "spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators present */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., tournament update, leaderboard update) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_link" TEXT /* URL to additional information related to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., practice round, competition round) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "spectator_access" TEXT /* Whether spectators are allowed */,
  "weather_forecast" TEXT /* Weather forecast for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
